message:
Add deflate/gzip/zlib compression using stored blocks format

Implement compression support that was previously returning NotImplemented:
- deflate(): Raw deflate using stored blocks (BTYPE=00)
- gzip(): Full gzip format with header, CRC32, and size footer
- deflateZlib(): Zlib-wrapped deflate with Adler-32 checksum

Uses deflate "stored blocks" format which produces valid deflate streams
that any standard decompressor can handle. This bypasses Zig 0.15's
incomplete flate.Compress API while maintaining full compatibility.

All 8 compression/decompression tests pass including roundtrip tests.
